headlines.title: Kornacki Cam: Watch Steve analyze midterm primary election results
headlines.description: NBC News chief data analyst Steve Kornacki breaks down real-time vote tallies from California, Iowa, New Jersey, Montana, South Dakota and New Mexico, while giving viewers a behind-the-scenes look at election night coverage.

headlines.title: Primary challengers threaten to unseat House members across the country
headlines.description: Four House members have already lost re-election bids so far this year, just a few months into primary season.

headlines.title: Supreme Court allows Alabama to use congressional map that eliminates a majority-Black district
headlines.description: The Supreme Court allowed Alabama to use a congressional map that eliminates one of two majority-Black districts in the state in a win for Republicans.

headlines.title: Man takes hostages at California bank as bomb threat prompts evacuations
headlines.description: A man was barricaded with an unknown number of hostages Tuesday at a California bank where police had received reports of a bomb threat.

headlines.title: U.S. targets ship trying to break through blockade
headlines.description: Centcom says the U.S. military disabled the engine of a ship trying to break through the blockade of Iran's ports. NBC News' Garrett Haake reports.

headlines.title: Todd Blanche says DOJ ‘not moving forward’ with ‘anti-weaponization’ fund
headlines.description: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche said Tuesday the Justice Department isn’t moving forward with its $1.8 billion “anti-weaponization” fund.

headlines.title: Housing official who targeted Trump’s enemies is named director of intelligence
headlines.description: President Donald Trump on Tuesday named an ally with no background in intelligence to oversee the nation’s spy agencies, taking the helm as the U.S. remains at war with Iran after a fresh round of peace talks stalled.

headlines.title: New ‘60 Minutes’ boss takes meetings with staffers after clash with Scott Pelley
headlines.description: “60 Minutes” executive producer Nick Bilton pressed ahead with plans to speak individually with staffers a day after correspondent Scott Pelley confronted him.

headlines.title: Protests erupt over U.S. Ebola quarantine center in Kenya
headlines.description: Hundreds of people gathered in Nanyuki, Kenya, to protest a U.S.-proposed Ebola quarantine center for American citizens exposed to the virus. Kenya does not have any suspected Ebola cases, but neighboring Uganda has reported nine and closed its border with the Democratic Republic of Congo.

headlines.title: Meet the Harvard grad who might lead the U.S. to World Cup glory
headlines.description: Matt Freese once wrote a college research project on penalty kicks. Now he’s competing to be the starting goalie for the U.S. men’s national team at this summer’s World Cup.

headlines.title: Josh Turek wins Democratic primary in battleground Iowa Senate race
headlines.description: Iowa state Rep. Josh Turek has won the Democratic nomination for his state’s open U.S.

headlines.title: Supreme Court allows Alabama to use congressional map that eliminates a majority-Black district
headlines.description: The Supreme Court allowed Alabama to use a congressional map that eliminates one of two majority-Black districts in the state in a win for Republicans.
